title: 'If you are not obsessed with your goals, choose new ones' — Dec 2018 title-only manifesto
html:
TL;DR

  • Title-only Apple Note from Dec 1, 2018 (Yahir age ~16) — "Y'all If you are not obsessed with your goals, choose new ones." No body. The title IS the thought, captured fast and never elaborated.
  • Earliest extant specimen of what later becomes the manifesto style note genre — single declarative aphorism, half-internal half-broadcast (the "Y'all" opener betrays Twitter-era self-publishing voice four years before he'd actually start posting).
  • The thesis is the same engine that gets named explicitly nine months later in the August 2019 2019 08 12 keep things simple note: "fear of not doing is greater than fear of doing it" (fear of not doing). Here at 16 the framing is the obverse — if you're not obsessed, replace the goal — same axiom in inverse polarity: motion-by-default, no slack tolerance.
  • Sits in the same December 2018 cluster as 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything (the Pokémon-type-chart self-portrait) and 2018 12 27 youtube for all the senses concept — three notes in 26 days that together draw the teen-Yahir operating system: don't be neutral, be obsessed, build the futuristic thing.
  • The "choose new ones" clause is the underrated half — implicit license to drop a goal that isn't pulling, which prefigures the 2024-2026 willingness to walk from the Brotein / BroMenu frames toward Rankett.

Key quote

"Y'all If you are not obsessed with your goals, choose new ones"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Counter-evidence to the cliché that grit means finishing the goal. Yahir's earliest manifesto is permission-to-pivot — a value that makes the multi-startup arc (Brotein → BroMenu → Rankett → stealth-apps) coherent rather than scattered.
  • Title-only notes are themselves a Yahir signal — when the line is sharp enough on first capture he doesn't elaborate. The body-less notes from 2018-2019 are the cleanest extracts of his teen-thesis voice.

Open questions

  • Whose framing is this? Original or quoted (Grant Cardone-era hustle Twitter was peaking)? No source attributed in the note.
  • Did Yahir ever revisit this line in later notes, or is it one-shot?

Wikilinks

fear of not doing · 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything · grants pass teen era · legacy question · disconnected from outcome
